targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, CASE WHEN SUM(t.cache_read_tokens + t.input_tokens) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) / SUM(t.cache_read_tokens + t.input_tokens) END AS cache_hit_pct FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read, SUM(t.input_tokens) AS fresh_input FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', m.timestamp) AS time, SUM(t.cache_creation_tokens) AS cache_creation FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT s.project, CASE WHEN SUM(t.cache_read_tokens + t.input_tokens) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE 100.0 * SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) / SUM(t.cache_read_tokens + t.input_tokens) END AS cache_hit_pct, SUM(t.cache_read_tokens) AS total_cache_read, SUM(t.input_tokens) AS total_fresh_input FROM token_usage t JOIN messages m ON m.message_uuid = t.message_uuid JOIN sessions s ON s.session_id = m.session_id WHERE m.timestamp BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() GROUP BY s.project ORDER BY cache_hit_pct DESC
